name: Pencil Physique Portrait (4x Upscale)
description: Transform your photo into a detailed black-and-white graphite pencil sketch with realistic anatomy + fast 4x upscale (2 credits)

default_prompts.image_edit:
Image A = FACE SOURCE (strict lock)
Image B = BODY + POSE SOURCE
Generate a highly detailed black-and-white pencil sketch.
CRITICAL:
Use ONLY Image A for the face. Do not use Image B for facial structure under any condition.
Face rules (absolute lock from Image A):
- exact face shape, jawline, cheekbones
- exact eyes, nose, lips
- exact hairstyle, hair volume, hairline
- exact beard style and density
- preserve identity and proportions 1:1
Body rules (from Image B only):
- torso, anatomy, pose, shoulders, abs
- skinny athletic build, shirtless, waist-up
- 3/4 angle, head slightly down, gaze below camera
If conflict occurs: PRIORITIZE IMAGE A FACE and ignore Image B face completely.
Style:
traditional graphite pencil sketch, visible strokes, cross-hatching, natural shading, paper grain.
No stylization, no face reinterpretation, no mixing identities, no cartoon, no smooth digital shading.
Lighting:
high contrast pencil shading, clean white background.
default_prompts.upscale: Ultra high-resolution black-and-white pencil sketch portrait, sharp detailed graphite strokes, fine anatomy rendering, paper grain texture, 8K, HDR
